matters.name: Traveller
matters.set4: When the equipping character takes DMG, recovers 30% of the DMG as HP. This can occour once every 4 Cycles.
matters.set: When the equipping character takes DMG more than 30% of their Max HP, the extra DMG dealt will be reduced by 50%. Additionally, creates a Shield equals to 15% of their Max HP. The Shield can be generated in this way every 6 Cycles.

matters.name: Merchant
matters.set4: When the equipping character HP is lower than 30%, DMG taken is reduced by 10%.
matters.set: For every 1,000 HP of the equipping character, DEF is increased by 2%.

matters.name: Travelling Merchant
matters.set: When the equipping character HP is above 60%, CRIT DMG of Normal Skill and Rifted Skill is increased by 40%.

matters.name: Knight
matters.set4: When the equipping character uses Normal Skill, CRIT Rate is increased by 10% for 4 Cycles.
matters.set: After the equipping character triggers a critical hit, their next Normal Skill deals 48% increased DMG. This effect cannot stack.

matters.name: Swamp
matters.set: When the equipping character receives healing, increases Magic PWR by 24% for 4 Cycles. Additionally, when the equipping character heals themselves, increases Magic PWR by an additional 24%.

matters.name: Knight Nightmares
matters.set: Increases Magic PWR by 24%. When the equipping character uses Normal Skill, gains 1 stack of Nightmare Fuel for 4 Cycles, max 3 stacks. Each stack increases Rifted Skill DMG by 24%. All Nightmare Fuel stacks will be consumed after using Rifted Skill.

matters.name: Rage
matters.set: When the equipping character consumes their HP, their Normal Attack DMG is increased by 24% for 2 Cycles. Additionally, after the equipping character deals Follow-up DMG, increases their Physical ATK by 24% for 2 Cycles.

matters.name: Target
matters.set: If the equipping character takes no DMG while being targeted, increases their CRIT DMG by 20% and 60% CRIT DMG can be gained through this way. If the equipping character takes DMG, the aforementioned effect will be removed.

matters.name: Weak Point
matters.set: After the equipping character casts Normal Skill, the next Normal Skill whithin 3 Cycles will have its DMG increased by 36% and thier next Follow-up CRIT DMG is increased by 60%.
